scope: Claude Code runtime layer stability audit and patch

config_files.settings.json: repo-level, 4 hook entries (SessionStart, Stop, SubagentStop, SessionEnd)
config_files.settings.local.json: user-level, 27 hook entries (UserPromptSubmit x3, PreToolUse x10, PostToolUse x8, PostToolUseFailure x2, SessionEnd x1, Stop x2)

root_causes_for_10min_stop: RC-1: No mid-session sidecar state save — if Claude crashes or compacts context, session_status.json is stale at 0%
RC-2: Stop gate only checks for 'in_progress' or 'completed' — no concept of 'interrupted' for unplanned exits
RC-3: SessionStart hook does not detect prior interrupted sessions — new session starts blind
RC-4: session-start.sh makes 5-6 SSH calls (5-8s connect timeout each) — contributes to slow startup but not the 10-minute stop itself
RC-5: 13-14 hooks per Edit/Write with up to 75s theoretical timeout budget — contributes to latency but not the silent stop

patches_applied.change: Added ~30 lines to detect prior session state (in_progress/blocked/completed/interrupted) from session_status.json and inject resume context into SessionStart additionalContext
Created new 75-line script. Auto-detects if session_status.json says 'in_progress' at session end, marks it as 'interrupted' with blocking_reason, updates heartbeat.json
Registered P2 as SessionEnd hook. Updated Stop gate prompt to recognize 'interrupted' as valid stop state. Updated SubagentStop prompt to match.

sidecar_lifecycle_after_patch.normal_flow: in_progress → completed (agent finishes work, writes final sidecar files)
sidecar_lifecycle_after_patch.planned_block: in_progress → blocked (agent hits blocker, writes blocking_reason + next_exact_step)
sidecar_lifecycle_after_patch.unplanned_exit: in_progress → interrupted (SessionEnd hook auto-fires, writes blocking_reason + interrupted_at)
sidecar_lifecycle_after_patch.resume: Next SessionStart detects interrupted/blocked status, injects resume context, agent continues

not_addressed: Hook overhead reduction (13-14 hooks per Edit/Write) — not causing the 10-minute stop, optimization deferred
session-start.sh SSH heaviness (5-6 calls) — contributes to slow startup, not causing silent stop, optimization deferred
Mid-session heartbeat updates — would require UserPromptSubmit hook, adds overhead, deferred

verification.sidecar_session_start_py: Reads session_status.json, injects resume context for in_progress/blocked/interrupted states
verification.sidecar_session_end_py: Auto-marks in_progress as interrupted, writes heartbeat with interrupted status
verification.settings_json_stop_gate: Recognizes interrupted as valid stop state alongside completed and blocked
verification.settings_json_session_end: Registered sidecar_session_end.py as SessionEnd command hook with 10s timeout
